arts.ttl: Football's best April Fools' Day jokes: Man United qualify for the Club World Cup, Premier League to hand promoted clubs a three-point head-start... and Chris Kamara's long-lost sister!
arts.sum: April Fools' Day jokes dominated social media on Tuesday morning, with some fans taking the opportunity to poke fun at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo, Casemiro & Co. - The most expensive ever transfers for players aged 30 or over
arts.sum: In ultra-modern football we have begun to see a real trend of the top clubs focusing on bringing in younger players. With more stringent financial fair play and restrictions, teams have had to be...

arts.ttl: 'I grew up watching Vidic videos' - Forest's Serb star Milenkovic
arts.sum: Before Nottingham Forest host Manchester United on Tuesday, BBC Sport speak to Serbia defender Nikola Milenkovic and his idol Nemanja Vidic.

arts.ttl: I went to FC United for their anti-Glazer protest - they could teach Man United a thing or two
arts.sum: FC United and The 1958 joined forces at Broadhurst Park on Saturday to protest against the Glazers' current ownership at Man United.

arts.ttl: £11m player wants a ‘way out’ of Nottingham Forest after falling out with Nuno Espírito Santo - journalist
arts.sum: He could be off in the summer.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo makes Big Six claim as Nottingham Forest eye Champions League
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest could qualify for next season's Champions League and manager Nuno Espirito Santo believes a number of clubs are now able to challenge the tradition 'Big Six'

arts.ttl: Agent says his client will “do everything” to help Ruben Amorim at Manchester United
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot’s agent has insisted his client will do everything in his power to help Ruben Amorim be a success at Manchester United. Record have comments from Carlos Gonçalves of ProEleven in which he discusses Dalot’s situation at Manchester United under Amorim. arts.ttl: Will Manchester United qualify for Europe? Take our fixtures predictor and find out
arts.sum: Man United have work to do if they are to qualify for Europe next season with their best chance perhaps coming through this season's Europa League.

arts.ttl: Why Man United Legends George Best and Bobby Charlton Grew to Hate Each Other
arts.sum: Man United legends George Best and Bobby Charlton grew to hate each other, with a feud so bitter they would not even pass the ball to each other.

arts.ttl: Jaap Stam claims Ruben Amorim is 'holding back' Manchester United star
arts.sum: Manchester United have struggled in front of goal so far this season and former Red Devils star Jaap Stam believes manager Ruben Amorim is to blame for their woes
